response.original_title: OSN: Musiche dall'America con Gianna Fratta e Alessandro Taverna
response.overview: From the ‘Arturo Toscanini’ Auditorium in Turin, for Rai Orchestra POPS, conductor Gianna Fratta, alongside solo pianist Alessandro Taverna, presents a programme dedicated to America: from the masterpieces of George Gershwin and Leonard Bernstein to the science-fiction scores of John Williams.
response.title: OSN: Musiche dall'America con Gianna Fratta e Alessandro Taverna
